title: 26AS TDS u/s 194J classifies to Head 3 but requires confirmation

expected_output.confirmation_reason: 194J applies to professional fees and technical services. Must confirm: (a) specified profession → 44ADA; (b) technical services → business income; (c) director sitting fees → salary.

notes: TDS u/s 194J alone is insufficient to distinguish a specified professional (44ADA), a technical services contractor (business under 44AD), or director sitting fees (salary). The rule correctly flags requires_confirmation. This triggers an intake question before income is classified.
